mapper.sql: id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_status, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time, version
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway_tool WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway_tool (gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_status, tool_description, tool_version, protocol_id, protocol_type, create_time, update_time, version) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolStatus}, #{toolDescription}, #{toolVersion}, #{protocolId}, #{protocolType}, NOW(), NOW(), 1)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway_tool WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} AND tool_id = #{toolId} LIMIT 1
